state.next-action: Quick task `quick-2026-04-07-composer-one-component-per-file` is extended and complete: the drawer launcher, viewport mode strip, and block library are split into smaller leaf files so the composer surfaces stay easier to review while behavior remains unchanged. Resume `18-06`. Architecture follow-ups captured in `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-layout-first-page-model-hero-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-instant-quote-app-block.md`, and `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-composer-media-target-model.md`.
